Cao Ai śõĻÁöö
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Ai (śõĻÁöö). Received a marquis title but was executed for his relation to Cao Shuang. Cao Ai was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Ai lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
